reviews.review_description:
...and potentially endless features to come through updates, hopefully!

Manipulating the controls is a little confusing at first, but this is a very rich visualiziner overall. The ability to customize your visual listening experience has so many possibilities in Gravity. Like myself, if you don't want to bother with loading songs, you can always turn down the volume headset and listen to your own music on speakers or through headphones alongside this app and still have a fantastic experience.

The pre-loaded songs aren't bad, either!

Great visualizer and gives me some cool background footage for projects. Btw all of the reviews that aren't 5 stars are just people whining that they downloaded a visualizer and got a visualizer, I read them. Also, the one thing I dislike is that it doesn't get updates. (If the developer does update it please add a way to play songs from Youtube.)
Completely useless.   I want to listen to my music.  That’s kinda the whole point.  You get what you pay for.
the visuals are amazing but it's pointless if you can't listen to music you actually enjoy

I’ve tried a bunch of music visualizers, but this one really feels next level. The way the visuals move and shift around you is super smooth and immersive. Sometimes it feels like you’re floating through a living painting that reacts to every sound. I’ve spent way more time in here than I expected — it’s just so easy to get lost in it.
Generally a very dull game with no valuable content

developer_response.body: Thank you for your comment! With multiple dynamic scenes that react to sound, it’s more of an interactive visual journey than a traditional game.

reviews.review_description: Sc€w "metaverse". This is classic oldschool cyberspace! Amazing. And quite trippy. Love the music. Gravity is an instant classic!
I could easily spend too much time in Gravity. I hope to be able to add more music to this app

This is the best VR audio vizualiser. 
I love it with my dopamin ! 
I think, it could be nice if the developer add more products each months etc…
It's very fun to just relax and just play around with the settings for some great visuals, but the only thing that I would want is the ability to add your own music
Awesome music, and create visuals, and I just kinda soaked it all in for 45 minutes. This is the kinda VR stuff I like. Dazzle me.

*** perfect visualization built super advanced mentalization for visual designer in futur VR electro club and event tool for your body your mind and soul this is great inspiring looking forward thank you very much.***
I had so much fun playing with this. It was like being back at the disco. I can't wait to see this expand even more!
